flashcards.front: What happens when you pass an object as a parameter to a method?
flashcards.back: A reference to the original object is passed to the method.

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the doubleValue method in the given code?
flashcards.back: To modify the value of the NumberBox object passed as a parameter.

flashcards.front: What is the output of the given code?
flashcards.back:
Before method call: 5
Inside method: 10
After method call: 10

flashcards.front: What is the advantage of passing objects as parameters?
flashcards.back: It allows for easier modification of the original object.

flashcards.front: What is the disadvantage of passing objects as parameters?
flashcards.back: It can lead to unexpected behavior if the object is modified unintentionally.
